weapons.name: BROKEN STRAIGHT SWORD
weapons.description: A broken straight sword. Despite its poor condition, its light weight allows for extremely fast swings.
weapons.lore: An old, chipped blade discarded by some forgotten warrior. Its edge is dull, but desperation sharpens the will.

weapons.name: BROADSWORD
weapons.description: A standard straight sword used widely by warriors. Well-balanced in both speed and striking power.
weapons.lore: A reliable blade forged in Lothric. Many knights carried this sword to their graves — and beyond.

weapons.name: GREATSWORD
weapons.description: An impossibly large sword requiring great strength. Its devastating power comes at the cost of slow, committed swings.
weapons.lore: A massive slab of iron that can barely be called a sword. Only those with inhuman strength dare wield it.
